primary_method: product-level DCF plus non-overlapping milestone probability trees, less senior claims and correlated-downside reserve
weighting_rationale: Use the routed primary method only after the decision-critical bridges reproduce; corroborating methods may bound outputs but cannot cure missing facts.
agreed_facts: 2025 total revenue was $9.891 billion and free cash flow approximately $2.1 billion before the Apellis closing.
MS product revenue fell 7.1% while rare-disease product revenue rose 8.4%; growth products increased 19%.
Biogen completed the approximately $5.6 billion Apellis acquisition on May 14, 2026, financed with cash and borrowings, with contractual SYFOVRE sales-based CVRs up to $4 per Apellis share.
disputed_facts: Product-level rebates, margins, sustaining cost and post-exclusivity tails do not reproduce marketed-product values.
Material indication probabilities, dependencies and remaining costs are not independently reconciled.
The first post-close balance sheet and purchase-price allocation were unavailable as of the evidence date.

operational_milestones: Quarterly product revenue and collaboration economics
Post-Apellis debt, integration and CVR liability
price_review_thresholds: Re-underwrite after a 20% price move or material probability update
thesis_break_conditions: Growth products do not offset legacy erosion after commercial cost
Post-close claims exceed value of acquired assets
Multiple material late-stage branches fail together
